fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Four Wheeler. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Make the four wheeler drive forward in a straight line"
"Simulate the vehicle turning in a tight circle"
"Give the four wheeler a bumpy off-road driving motion"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"Increase the wheel friction so it grips better on the ground"
"Add some suspension bounciness to the chassis"
"Simulate what happens if the vehicle hits a slope"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add a second four wheeler to the scene for comparison"
"Make the vehicle body larger and heavier"
"Change the wheel size to see how it affects movement"
